humanSummary.text: Audit found no P0/P1 blockers. CATALOG-011 satisfies alpha blocking criteria; one P2 and one P3 hardening finding were converted into follow-up DAG nodes.

findings.title: Recorded importer seed hints can bypass readiness-aware selection
findings.description: The recorded importer converts fixture-authored seedTarget hints into pending importer seed targets for every fact by default.

evidence.detail: Audit found fixture priority and benchmark hints can become importer seed targets before CATALOG-004's readiness-aware seed finder exists.

findings.impact: Alpha benchmark selection could treat importer-authored hints as selectable evidence before ownership, completeness, demand, engine readiness, and usefulness filters run.
actionableAcceptanceCriteria: CATALOG-011 importer seed hints are inert/non-selectable until CATALOG-004 consumes them through readiness filters and explanation output, or CATALOG-011 imports facts/provenance only.
Regression coverage proves importer fixture hints cannot become benchmark-selectable without CATALOG-004 criteria.

proposedDagNode.title: Recorded importer seed hint gating
proposedDagNode.summary: Prevent CATALOG-011 recorded importer seed hints from becoming benchmark-selectable before readiness-aware CATALOG-004 filtering and explanations run.
deliverables: Benchmark selection regression for importer hints
acceptanceCriteria: Importer-authored seedTarget hints are stored as inert evidence or omitted until CATALOG-004 consumes them.
Benchmark candidate queries exclude importer seed hints that lack CATALOG-004 readiness explanation records.
Source fact provenance remains available for later seed explanation generation.
auditFocus: Importer fixture hints treated as final selection decisions

findings.title: Recorded fixture fetches use raw cache provenance kind
findings.description: Recorded fixture fetches are stored as raw_cache despite the registry having a recorded_fixture kind.

evidence.detail: Audit found this does not duplicate records or lose source ids, but it weakens fixture-vs-live provenance clarity for future explanations.

findings.impact: Future benchmark explanations could present recorded fixture payloads as generic raw cache unless provenance consumers expose fixture mode clearly.
actionableAcceptanceCriteria: Recorded importer fixture runs are persisted with recorded_fixture, or provenance consumers expose a clear fixture id/mode marker.
Benchmark explanation fixtures distinguish recorded fixture payloads from live/raw cache payloads.

proposedDagNode.title: Recorded fixture provenance kind clarity
proposedDagNode.summary: Clarify recorded importer fixture provenance so fixture-backed catalog facts cannot be mistaken for live raw cache evidence.
deliverables: Explanation fixture distinguishing raw cache and recorded fixture evidence
acceptanceCriteria: Recorded fixture imports expose recorded_fixture provenance or an equivalent fixture mode marker.
Public explanations can distinguish fixture replay evidence from live/raw cache evidence.
auditFocus: Fixture provenance hidden as raw cache
